overview: Admission management system for Adarsh Siksha Kendre, Bajra, Mandar, Ranchi (Est. 2005). Manage student records, track admission and monthly class fees, and control access for authorized staff.
features: Student records — editable name, mobile, DOB, father's/mother's name, class
Admission fee ₹300 — PhonePe QR + Cash option, manually marked Paid/Pending
Monthly class fee tracker — 12 months per student with Paid/Pending status
Search and filter students by name or mobile number
